title: That God is patient for this end, that we may repent of our sin, and be reformed.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That God is patient for this end, that we may repent of our sin, and be reformed.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Solomon, in Ecclesiasticus: “Say not, I have sinned, and what sorrow hath happened to me?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: For the Highest is a patient repayer.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also Paul to the Romans: “Or despisest thou the riches of His goodness, and forbearance, and patience, not knowing that the goodness of God leadeth thee to repentance?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: But, according to thy hardness and impenitent heart, thou treasurest up to thyself wrath in the day of wrath and of revelation of the just judgment of God, who will render to every man according to his deeds.”
